name: corelmm
description: Monitor LiteLLM API key balances, budgets, and usage directly from VS Code status bar

corelmm.apiKey.description: Your LiteLLM API key to check balance for. If empty, the Authorization header will use the key being queried.

corelmm.adminKey.description: Admin/proxy master key (if required) for querying key info. Leave empty if using the same key as apiKey.

corelmm.username.description: LiteLLM UI username (for login-based auth). The extension will login and extract the embedded API key from the session.

corelmm.password.description: LiteLLM UI password (for login-based auth). Stored in VS Code secret storage.

corelmm.endpoint.description: The LiteLLM proxy endpoint URL (e.g., http://localhost:4000 or http://core.llm)

corelmm.refreshInterval.description: Auto-refresh interval in seconds (minimum 5). Set to 0 to disable auto-refresh.

corelmm.showKeyAlias.description: Show the key alias/name in the status bar next to the balance

corelmm.showSpendLogs.description: Also display recent spend in the status bar (uses /spend/logs)

corelmm.budgetWarningThreshold.description: Warning threshold percentage. When remaining budget falls below this % of max_budget, show a warning.

corelmm.keyToQuery.description: Optional: Query a specific key (different from the auth key). If empty, queries the key used for authentication.

corelmm.reportDuration.description: Time range for the Budget Overview spend report.

corelmm.reportCustomStart.description: Custom start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the spend report when reportDuration=custom.

corelmm.reportCustomEnd.description: Custom end date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the spend report when reportDuration=custom.
